creator: owens46@bellsouth.net
text:
When starting installation, booting from CDROM or Floppies when the inital boot is complete and the install program changes to a red screen
and starts to probe for hardware the kernel panics with the message:
"Panic: Going nowhere without my init".  It will then automaticly reboot
and repeat the same sequence.

Fix: 

Unknown - Booting from the CDROM or floppies results in the same message.
How-To-Repeat: Same as above
